ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Completed"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), "Active")) ), AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Completed"), TODAY() <= Sales_Close_Date__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only change the Status to 'Completed' if the current Status is 'Active' and today's date is after the Sales Close Date.
